title: Resident. enginner , senior resident. engineer
description:
Resident enginner / senior resident enginner

to apply :

please submit your application to qpcheng@gmail.com, or whatsapp to +6594551399 stating
1) your curent. & previous position & briefy curent & expected salary & availabilty( notice)
2) SG Citizen ,PR or pass. status
3) Qualifications and award/profesional status, skils as relevant to this position (
cert of Degree, Diploma ,A or O level etc , and other details
4) Duties and resposibilities role in chronologivcal order
Roles & Responsibilities

Job Requirement:

Registered with IES/ ACES with min 5 years relevant working experience for Civil Works projects, and min 3 years of experience in supervision of works. 

  • Must be fully conversant with BCA Regulations, maintenance of systematic site records, government contract documents and meet BCA reporting requirements.
  • Degree in Civil & Structural Engineering, Recognised. by the PEB, and a registered RE
  • Experience in supervising major earthworks, roads and drainage works, and others road widening , park connectors, linkways, POB, buildings , viaducts, installation of utilities, and associated works.
  • Only SC/SPR/ Epass

Job Description:

  • Provide site supervision for Civil, Structural and geotechinical, temporary works & miscellaneous works for infrastructure or building projects.
  • In charge of RTOs on their day-to-day duties.
  • Liaison with contractor on work schedule, progress, work quality, site safety and quality control, etc, in relation to specifications.
  • Liaison and co-ordinate with relevant authorities and local communities for works executed on site.
  • Carry out duties as QP representative as specified under BCA regulations and report to the project QP and Engineers.
  • Administration of contract including assessment of progress payment claims, variations work, extension of time, etc.
  • Ensure works carried out by the Contractor are in accordance with the drawings and specifications, approved work methods and schedule.
  • Track and review Contractor’s submissions e.g. materials, suppliers, construction methodology, etc.
  • Liaison and co-ordinate with other Contractor working on site.
  • Give regular feedback and report as required to the Consultant on the works progress, as well as improvement items pertaining to safety, supervision, security, construction, maintenance, etc.
  • Actively participate in weekly site safety inspection with Contractor and Authority’s Representative.
  • Chair regular monitoring review meetings with Contractor(s) and IM Contractor(s) to review readings (using real-time monitoring systems) and identify trends of concern in relation to all construction activities.

postedCompany.description:
Ciwise Consultants - OUR Operating office is  at  Ang Mo Kio 

( 32 Ang Mo Kio Ind Park 2, #03-14, Singapore 569510) 


We are an international design and project management firm offering a wide range of professional services in design and consulting in the specialist field of micro-tunneling and trenchless technology. It brings together team of highly specialist having wide range of disciplines, with strong international experiences.


Our Strength

We have greater emphasize on technical excellence on all our works, integrated multi discipline will greatly benefit our clients and projects. We have proven track record ,our expertise covering new built and existing buildings. We strongly believe our International Experience will greatly influence for a positive impact on a project.

We have a strong team of professionally trained specialists for trenchless technology site work supervisions, monitoring, and implementing qualities on ground.


Technical Excellence

We strive to achieve highest level of technical satisfaction on all our works we do right from design to implementation. We invest in technologies and skills to keep our team up to date with international trends.


Design Culture

We have conducive working environment to promote innovative ideas and knowledge sharing. We maintain our team with skills and knowledge covering wide spectrum of design.

Honest and Ethical Business Practice

We highly value honest and ethical business practices at all levels of our team. Our most valuable awards are our client feedback as “honest and trusted firm”

Ciwise Consultant’s value long-term partnerships with a diverse and growing customer base , of public and private stakeholders government agencies and educational institutions.


Singapore, India and Malaysia clients

Principal  Officers


Er.Cheng Kim Hua,David – Principal Engineer


Er. Cheng is a registered Professional engineer in Singapore and Malaysia  as an Aseam PE.

He has been in the engineering / construction works since 1976. A total of 36 years involving in the planning, design, and construction supervision and business development of engineering works including civil and infra and trenchless /Tunnel works/ structures. He has covered countries including Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Vietnam, India and Middle East


He  served in many professional bodies such as the vice president of the Institution of Engineers, Malaysia, and Board Member of the Highway Authority, Malaysia and the Board of Engineers, Malaysia.He has also served in the continuing Education committee of the PE Board, Singapore and as Treasurer of Singapore Concrete Institute. he is also a Chartered Management Accoutants , UK
